extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder tool configuration panel for the ServiceNow tool named "Search Incidents by Incident Number." The tool details are visible, including the name, activity, description, and the required ServiceNow connection field. The shared ServiceNow connection is already selected and highlighted, and the Primary section with the Incident ID input is visible below.
extraction.step_instructions: Select "Shared ServiceNow Connection" in the "ServiceNow connection *" field. Confirm that the shared connection is populated for the "Search Incidents by Incident Number" tool, then proceed to the next configuration step.
